common Directory Reference(3) Library Functions Manual common Directory Reference(3)

NAME

common Directory Reference

SYNOPSIS

Files


file buffer_sizes.h
Common buffer size definitions. file error_codes.h
Error and exit codes - unified status values (0-255). file limits.h
Application limits and constraints. file log_rates.h
Logging rate limit constants (in microseconds). file protocol_constants.h
Protocol version, features, compression, and frame flag constants. file shutdown.h
Shutdown check system for clean library/application separation. file string_constants.h
String literal constants.
